answer:
Reducto uses API key-based authentication [1][2]. To authenticate, create an API key in Reducto Studio and set it as the REDUCTO_API_KEY environment variable [1][3].

For REST API calls, include the key in the Authorization header as a Bearer token [1]:

```bash
-H "Authorization: Bearer $REDUCTO_API_KEY"
```

The Python and Node.js SDKs automatically detect and use this environment variable [1][2][3]. For the Go SDK, you must pass the key explicitly to the client initialization [1][4]:

```go
client := reducto.NewClient(option.WithAPIKey(os.Getenv("REDUCTO_API_KEY")))
```

results.title: Reducto API Reference for Coding Agents - Reducto
